templateAssets.title: Template Assets
templateAssets.description: Replace the starter assets used by this template without digging through the timeline.
templateAssets.noTemplateProjectDescription: Create a project from a template first, then come back here to swap its starter assets.
templateAssets.emptyDescription: This template does not expose any replaceable media slots yet.
templateAssets.missingAssetHint: The current asset is unavailable in this project.

mobileGate.title: Desktop only (for now)
mobileGate.description: OpenCut isn't optimized for mobile or iPad yet. Things will break and the layout will be a mess. Come back on a desktop for the real experience.

degradedBanner.message: For the best experience, open OpenCut in Chrome.

export.preflightPassed: No issues that would block export.
export.preflightEmptyTimeline: The timeline is empty and cannot be exported.
export.preflightNoAudio: Audio is enabled, but the current scene has no exportable audio clips.
export.preflightTransparentBackground: The background is transparent, which may appear black in some players.

captions.title: Captions
captions.noCaptionsToExport: The current scene has no captions to export
captions.noValidSubtitleCues: No valid subtitle cues were found in the subtitle file
captions.importedWithSkipped: Imported {importedCount} subtitle cue(s) and skipped {skippedCount} malformed cue(s).
captions.editableHint: Generated captions are inserted as editable text clips on a new text track, with the whole batch selected for quick style changes.

overview.title: Talking-head rough cut
overview.description: Analyze pauses on the active scene, generate jump cut suggestions, and apply a centered crop for talking-head clips.

suggestions.title: Suggestions
suggestions.empty: Run analysis to generate silence cut suggestions.

messages.noTargets: No eligible clips were found for this scope.
messages.noSuggestions: No removable silence was detected with the current settings.

overview.title: Localized dubbing workflow
overview.description: Analyze your timeline audio, translate each speaker, synthesize a dubbed mix, and insert it back into the project.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Keys are stored in this browser's local storage and are used only when running the corresponding dubbing step.

voiceSourceDescriptions.single-reference: Use one reference voice for every segment, either uploaded during synthesis or selected from a local voice library.
voiceSourceDescriptions.auto-speakers: During synthesis, extract a reference voice sample for each speaker from the transcribed source audio.

apiKeys.voiceLibraryHint: Put audio files in the project xtts-voices folder, then refresh to select them.
apiKeys.voiceLibraryLoadFailed: Failed to load local voice library

analysis.title: Analyze Timeline
analysis.description: Select the target language and run speaker diarization on the active timeline audio.
analysis.complete: Analysis complete. Review and edit the transcript.

messages.missingApiKey: AssemblyAI API key is required for analysis. Configure it in Settings > API Keys first.
messages.noAudio: The current timeline does not have audible media.
messages.failed: Failed to analyze the timeline audio.

transcript.title: Label Speakers & Edit Transcript
transcript.description: Rename speakers and fix transcript lines before translation.
transcript.emptyState: Run analysis to generate speaker segments.

messages.missingApiKey: DeepSeek API key is required for translation. Configure it in Settings > API Keys first.
messages.complete: Translation complete. Review the bilingual comparison.
messages.deepSeekAccountInactive: The DeepSeek account is not active or billing is unavailable. Check balance/payment details on the DeepSeek platform, or retry with an active DeepSeek API key.

synthesis.title: Compare & Synthesize
synthesis.description: Review original and translated lines, then clone voices and render the dubbed audio.
synthesis.localXttsEndpointHint: Configure the local XTTS endpoint in Settings > API Keys.

voiceSourceDescriptions.single-reference: Every translated segment will be synthesized with the same reference voice.
voiceSourceDescriptions.auto-speakers: Uses the source audio from analysis to automatically sample each speaker's voice.

synthesis.noLibraryReferenceVoice: Choose a reference audio file from the project voice library in the dubbing settings first.

messages.missingSourceAudio: Source audio is not ready. Run analysis again.
messages.missingApiKey: ElevenLabs API key is required for synthesis. Configure it in Settings > API Keys first.
messages.missingLocalXttsEndpoint: Configure the local XTTS synthesis endpoint in Settings > API Keys first.
messages.missingSingleReferenceVoice: Upload a reference audio file first, or switch to automatic multi-speaker voices in the dubbing settings.
messages.missingLibraryReferenceVoice: Choose a reference audio file from the project voice library in the dubbing settings first.
messages.complete: Dubbed audio is ready to apply to the timeline.
messages.cleanupWarning: Dubbed audio is ready. Some temporary cloned voices could not be deleted.
messages.waitingForTranslations: Translate every segment to unlock synthesis.

apply.title: Apply Dubbing
apply.description: Mute the original audio tracks and add the dubbed mix as a new timeline track.

messages.missingContext: An active project and scene are required.
messages.missingAudio: Synthesize every segment before applying the dubbing track.
messages.processAssetFailed: Failed to process the dubbed audio asset.
messages.saveAssetFailed: Failed to save the dubbed audio asset.
messages.complete: Dubbing applied. The original audio tracks are muted.

errors.encodeExtractedAudio: Failed to encode the extracted audio
errors.readExtractedAudio: Failed to read the extracted audio
errors.noUsableVoiceSamples: No usable voice samples were found for {speakerId}.

effects.title: Effects
effects.emptyDescription: Add effects to this layer from the Assets panel.

empty.title: It's empty here
empty.description: Click an element on the timeline to edit its properties

library.projectDescription: Create a new project from a built-in starter or one of your saved templates.
library.sceneDescription: Insert a saved scene template into the current project, or replace the active scene with one.

fields.name: Template name
fields.includeExampleMedia: Include current media as demo assets
fields.includeExampleMediaHint: Saved media becomes optional defaults. Anyone using the template can keep those files or replace them with their own.

builtin-project-talking-head.name: Talking Head Starter
builtin-project-talking-head.description: A fast talking-head template for knowledge clips and quick social edits.

builtin-project-photo-slideshow.name: Photo Slideshow Reel
builtin-project-photo-slideshow.description: A five-photo slideshow starter for travel, memories, and recap edits.

builtin-project-product-promo.name: Product Promo
builtin-project-product-promo.description: A clean commerce promo template for product hero shots and offers.

builtin-project-podcast-clip.name: Podcast Clip
builtin-project-podcast-clip.description: A vertical clip layout for interviews, podcasts, and talking-head highlights.

builtin-scene-cta.name: CTA Scene
builtin-scene-cta.description: A closing call-to-action scene for follows, clicks, and link prompts.

builtin-scene-meme-caption.name: Meme Caption Scene
builtin-scene-meme-caption.description: A classic top-and-bottom caption scene for memes and reaction content.

builtin-scene-holiday-greeting.name: Holiday Greeting
builtin-scene-holiday-greeting.description: A festive greeting scene for holidays, birthdays, and anniversary wishes.

builtin-scene-travel-opener.name: Travel Opener
builtin-scene-travel-opener.description: An opener scene for travel vlogs, destination edits, and city montages.

builtin-scene-sale-announcement.name: Sale Announcement
builtin-scene-sale-announcement.description: A promo scene for discounts, flash sales, and retail announcements.

builtin-scene-before-after.name: Before / After
builtin-scene-before-after.description: A split-screen comparison scene for transformations and side-by-side reveals.

builtin-project-ugc-testimonial.name: UGC Testimonial Ad
builtin-project-ugc-testimonial.description: A vertical testimonial ad template for creator-style reviews and social proof.

builtin-project-app-demo.name: App Demo Walkthrough
builtin-project-app-demo.description: A clean app promo template for feature launches, onboarding, and walkthroughs.

builtin-project-event-invite.name: Event Invite Promo
builtin-project-event-invite.description: A fast invite template for webinars, launches, meetups, and countdown teasers.

builtin-project-tutorial-carousel.name: Tutorial Steps
builtin-project-tutorial-carousel.description: A step-by-step tutorial template for explainers, teaching clips, and workflows.

builtin-scene-quote-card.name: Quote Card
builtin-scene-quote-card.description: A quote scene for punchlines, takeaways, and reflective closing moments.

builtin-scene-unboxing-highlight.name: Unboxing Highlight
builtin-scene-unboxing-highlight.description: A reveal scene for first impressions, product drops, and unboxing moments.

builtin-scene-recipe-card.name: Recipe Card
builtin-scene-recipe-card.description: A food scene for dish titles, recipe intros, and quick cooking highlights.

builtin-scene-workout-progress.name: Workout Progress
builtin-scene-workout-progress.description: A progress scene for training logs, challenge updates, and fitness milestones.

builtin-scene-news-flash.name: News Flash
builtin-scene-news-flash.description: A breaking-news scene for short updates, alerts, and headline-driven clips.

builtin-scene-creator-intro.name: Creator Intro
builtin-scene-creator-intro.description: An intro scene for creator branding, self-intros, and channel openers.

saveProject.title: Save Project Template
saveProject.description: Turn the current project into a reusable template with replaceable media slots.

saveScene.title: Save Scene Template
saveScene.description: Save the current scene as a reusable template for future projects.

states.selectTemplate: Select a template to review its media slots.
states.noSlots: This template does not require any media slots.
states.autoFilledSlot: If you leave this empty, the app will insert a demo placeholder image that you can replace later.
states.missingRequiredSlots: {count} required media slot(s) are still missing. Upload files first.

errors.missingRequiredSlots: Fill the required media slots first

footer.tagline: The privacy-first video editor that feels simple to use.

hero.backgroundAlt: OpenCut video editor landing page background
hero.description: A simple but powerful video editor that gets the job done. Works on any platform.

metadata.title: Roadmap - OpenCut
metadata.description: See what's coming next for OpenCut - the free, open-source video editor that respects your privacy.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.description: What's coming next for OpenCut (last updated: {lastUpdated})

start.title: Start
start.description: This is where it all started. Repository created, initial project structure, and the vision for a free, open-source video editor. [Check out the first tweet](https://x.com/mazeincoding/status/1936706642512388188) to see where it started.

coreUi.title: Core UI
coreUi.description: Build the foundation - main layout, header, sidebar, timeline container, and basic component structure. Not all functionality yet, but the UI framework that everything else builds on.

essentialFunctionality.title: Essential functionality
essentialFunctionality.description: Everything that makes a video editor **useful**. Timeline interactivity, storage, effects, transitions, etc.

nativeApp.title: Native app (mobile/desktop)
nativeApp.description: Native OpenCut apps for Mac, Windows, Linux, and iOS/Android.

contribute.title: Want to help?
contribute.description: OpenCut is open source and built by the community. Every contribution, no matter how small, helps us build the best free video editor possible.

metadata.title: Contributors - OpenCut
metadata.description: Meet the amazing people who contribute to OpenCut, the free and open-source video editor.

contributors.title: Contributors
contributors.description: Meet the amazing people who contribute to OpenCut, the free and open-source video editor.

externalTools.title: External tools
externalTools.description: Tools we use to build OpenCut

contribute.title: Join the community
contribute.description: OpenCut is built by developers like you. Every contribution, no matter how small, helps make video editing more accessible for everyone.

metadata.title: Sponsors - OpenCut
metadata.description: Support OpenCut and help us build the future of free and open-source video editing.

sponsors.title: Sponsors
sponsors.description: Support OpenCut and help us build the future of privacy-first video editing.

metadata.title: Blog - OpenCut
metadata.description: Read the latest news and updates about OpenCut, the free and open-source video editor.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Read the latest news and updates about OpenCut, the free and open-source video editor.

metadata.title: Changelog - OpenCut
metadata.openGraphDescription: Every update, improvement, and fix to OpenCut — documented.

empty.searchDescription: Your search for "{query}" did not return any results.
empty.noProjectsDescription: Start creating your first project. Import media, edit, and export your videos. All privately.

templates.title: Start faster with reusable formats
templates.description: Browse built-in starters and your own saved templates without leaving the projects page. Pick a category, preview the demo asset, replace the starter files, and create a project in one flow.
templates.templateFlowHint: Projects created here open with Template Assets ready, so you can swap starter files immediately.
templates.selectTemplateDescription: Select a template card to preview its layout, starter assets, and media slots.

shelves.recommendedDescription: Templates ranked by internal quality, your favorites, and recent usage.
shelves.recentDescription: Jump back into templates you used recently without re-sorting the whole library.

empty.title: No matching templates
empty.description: Adjust your search or filters to see more templates.

brand.title: Brand
brand.description: Download OpenCut brand assets for use in your projects.

symbol.title: Symbol
symbol.description: Use the symbol on its own when the OpenCut name is already present nearby or space is limited.

lockup.title: Lockup
lockup.description: The full lockup combines the symbol and wordmark. Prefer this in most contexts where you have enough horizontal space.

usage.title: Usage
usage.description: OpenCut is open source — the code is free to use under its license. That license does not cover the name or logo. You can say you use OpenCut, that your project integrates with OpenCut, or that it was built on top of OpenCut. You cannot name your product OpenCut, imply we made or endorse your product, or use the marks commercially without asking first. For anything unclear, reach out at

notAllowed.title: What's not allowed
items: Using OpenCut in the name of your product, service, or domain.
Implying that OpenCut made, sponsors, or endorses your work.
Using the logo or name on merchandise or commercial marketing.
Modifying the marks.

metadata.title: Privacy Policy - OpenCut
metadata.description: Learn how OpenCut handles your data and privacy. Our commitment to protecting your information while you edit videos.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.description: Learn how we handle your data and privacy. Contact us if you have any questions.

quickSummary.title: Quick summary
quickSummary.heading: Your content never leaves your device.
items: Basic editing happens locally in your browser - we never see your files
AI features like auto captions run locally in your browser too - nothing is uploaded
OpenCut does not currently require an account or login
Project data stays on your device, not our servers
We use anonymized analytics to improve the app, but no personal video content is tracked
You can clear local data from your browser at any time
We don't sell or share your data with anyone (we don't even have it)

content.title: How We Handle Your Content
content.lead: All editing and processing happens locally on your device.
content.body: We never upload, store, or have access to your video or audio files. Your content remains completely private and under your control. AI-powered features like auto captions also run in your browser using on-device models - no content ever leaves your device.

accounts.title: Accounts & Authentication
accounts.p1: OpenCut does not currently offer user accounts, login, or Google sign-in.
accounts.p2: Because there is no account system today, we do not collect account emails, profile information, or OAuth identity data.
accounts.p3: Your projects are never stored on our servers. All project data, including names, thumbnails, and creation dates, is stored locally in your browser using IndexedDB.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.p1After: for basic, anonymized visitor counts. We do not track clicks, interactions, or how you use the editor.
analytics.p2: No personal information is collected, no individual users are tracked, and no data that could identify you is stored.

localStorage.title: Local Storage & Cookies
localStorage.intro: We use browser local storage and IndexedDB to:
items: Save your projects locally on your device
Remember your editor preferences and settings
Store app state needed for the editor to work between sessions
localStorage.outro: All data stays on your device and can be cleared at any time through your browser settings.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
items: Vercel: For hosting and content delivery
Databuddy: For anonymized analytics

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.intro: You have complete control over your data:
items: No account is required to use OpenCut today
Clear local storage to remove all saved projects
Contact us with any privacy concerns

transparency.title: Open Source Transparency
transparency.p1: OpenCut is completely open source. You can review our code, see exactly how we handle data, and even self-host the application if you prefer.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Questions about this privacy policy or how we handle your data?

metadata.title: Terms of Service - OpenCut
metadata.description: OpenCut's Terms of Service. Fair, transparent terms for our free and open-source video editor.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.description: Fair and transparent terms for our free, open-source video editor. Contact us if you have any questions.

quickSummary.title: Quick summary
quickSummary.heading: You own your content, we own nothing.
items: Everything runs locally in your browser - nothing is ever uploaded to our servers
We never claim ownership of your content
Free for personal and commercial use with no watermarks or restrictions
You're responsible for how you use it - don't break the law
Service provided "as is" - we can't guarantee perfect uptime
Open source means you can review our code and self-host if needed
No account required - your exported videos are always yours

rights.title: Your Content, Your Rights
rights.body: All editing and processing happens locally on your device. We never see, store, or have access to your files. We make no claims to ownership, licensing, or rights over your videos, projects, or any content you create using OpenCut.
items: Your content never leaves your device
You retain all intellectual property rights to your content
You can export and use your content however you choose
No watermarks, no licensing restrictions from OpenCut

usage.title: How You Can Use OpenCut
usage.intro: OpenCut is free for personal and commercial use. You can:
items: Create videos for personal, educational, or commercial purposes
Use OpenCut for client work and paid projects
Share and distribute videos created with OpenCut
Modify and distribute the OpenCut software (under MIT license)
usage.outro: You're responsible for how you use OpenCut and the content you create. Don't use it for anything illegal in your jurisdiction.

ai.title: AI Features
ai.body: AI features like auto captions run entirely in your browser using on-device models. No content is uploaded to any server. These features are optional - you can use OpenCut without them.

service.title: Service
service.body: OpenCut does not currently require an account. The service is provided "as is" without warranties. While we strive for reliability, we can't guarantee uninterrupted service.

openSource.title: Open Source Benefits
openSource.intro: Because OpenCut is open source, you have additional rights:
items: Review our code to see exactly how we handle your data
Self-host OpenCut on your own servers
Modify the software to suit your needs
Contribute improvements back to the community
openSource.beforeGithub: View our source code and license on

limitations.title: Limitations and Liability
limitations.intro: OpenCut is provided free of charge. To the extent permitted by law:
items: We're not liable for any loss of data or content
Projects are stored in your browser and may be lost if you clear browser data
We're not responsible for how you use the service
Our liability is limited to the maximum extent allowed by law
limitations.outro: Since your content stays on your device, we have no way to recover lost projects. Consider exporting important videos when finished editing.

serviceChanges.title: Service Changes
serviceChanges.intro: We may update OpenCut and these terms:
items: We'll notify you of significant changes to these terms
Continued use means you accept any updates
You can always self-host an older version if you prefer
Major changes will be discussed with the community on GitHub

stoppingUse.title: Stopping Use
stoppingUse.intro: You can stop using OpenCut at any time:
items: Clear your browser data to remove local projects

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Questions about these terms or need to report an issue?
contact.outro: These terms are governed by applicable law in your jurisdiction. We prefer to resolve disputes through friendly discussion in our open-source community.
